dailyNews.title: Rapper Lil Tjay arrested in Florida following Offset shooting incident
dailyNews.description: Lil Tjay has been arrested in Florida in connection with a shooting involving Offset. Authorities say the incident began as a fight, while the rapper’s lawyer denies claims linking him directly to the shooting.

dailyNews.title: Battleground Baramati: Ajit Pawar’s son faces criticism over ‘immature’ comments against Congress
dailyNews.description: Calling him an ‘ungrateful son’, a bad orator, Congress questioned his ‘political convenience’ and silence over his father’s accidental death

dailyNews.title: Taiwan Opposition Leader Lands In China, Calls Visit A 'Journey To Peace'
dailyNews.description: The visit is the first by a Taiwanese opposition leader in a decade and comes ahead of a meeting in Beijing between Xi and U.S. President Donald Trump scheduled to take place in May.

dailyNews.title: Iraqi armed group releases abducted US journalist Shelly Kittleson
dailyNews.description: The armed group Kataib Hezbollah said that it would free Kittleson on the condition that she leave Iraq immediately.

dailyNews.title: Politicians, celebrities slam Donald Trump over ‘whole civilization will die’ threat to Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to Iran has sparked backlash from actors, politicians, and the UN Secretary-General, who have issued warnings against genocide and the violation of international law.

dailyNews.title: What the US military could do if Iran fails to meet Trump's ultimatum
dailyNews.description: The US can do a lot of damage to civilian infrastructure but military experts say it's not feasible to carry out all Trump's threats.

dailyNews.title: On Trump's Iran will ‘die’ threat, former US Army officer Lawrence Sellin says ‘military will not obey illegal orders’
dailyNews.description: After US President Donald Trump's fresh threat to Iran, Lawrence Sellin, a retired US Army Reserve colonel, also warned that “the issuance of illegal orders would create a Constitutional crisis.”

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals what happens if Iran doesn't meet ‘8 pm’ deadline: 'US is ready to...'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has extended previous deadlines but suggested the one set for 8 pm in Washington was final.

dailyNews.title: Trump says "whole civilization will die tonight" as Iran deadline looms
dailyNews.description: Iran's regime calls on civilians to shield power plants as Trump threatens "a whole civilization" with destruction if Tehran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices, stocks swing sharply ahead of Trump's Tuesday deadline for Iran
dailyNews.description: "This is a potentially huge market event like no other. It's a known unknown with a clock," one investment adviser said.

dailyNews.title: Trump reviewing Pakistani proposal to extend Iran deadline by 2 weeks
dailyNews.description: Pakistan's prime minister is calling on President Trump to extend his deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz by two weeks "to allow diplomacy to run its course." CBS News senior White House and political correspondent Ed O'Keefe has the details.

dailyNews.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche open to serving in job permanently
dailyNews.description: "It's the greatest honor of a lifetime, and if President Trump chooses to keep me as acting, that's an honor," Blanche said. "If he chooses to nominate me, that's an honor."
